results.description: saf/ public function return types depend on crate extensibility: if spi/ exists, return `impl Trait` for downstream polymorphism; if spi/ does not exist, return concrete types only (no trait leaks)

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl MessageBroker` where `MessageBroker` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait MessageBroker` to `pub(crate) trait MessageBroker` and remove this pub fn returning it

violations.message: saf/ pub fn returns `-> impl TaskQueue` where `TaskQueue` is a local trait — not allowed
violations.expected: Make trait pub(crate) and compose operations inside the facade instead
violations.fix_hint: Change `pub trait TaskQueue` to `pub(crate) trait TaskQueue` and remove this pub fn returning it
